GameConfig/StartingGear/Credits.label: Starting Credits
GameConfig/StartingGear/Credits.description: Credits granted to a new character on spawn.

validation.message: Starting credits must be a whole number.

GameConfig/SunHeatDamage/DamagePerBlock.label: Sun Heat Damage Per Block
GameConfig/SunHeatDamage/DamagePerBlock.description: Damage applied per block when sun heat damage triggers.

GameConfig/SunHeatDamage/MaxDelayBetween.label: Max Delay Between Sun Hits
GameConfig/SunHeatDamage/MaxDelayBetween.description: Maximum random delay between consecutive sun heat damage hits.

GameConfig/SunHeatDamage/SunDamageRadius.label: Sun Damage Radius
GameConfig/SunHeatDamage/SunDamageRadius.description: Radius around the entity where sun damage applies.

GameConfig/SunHeatDamage/SunDamageDelayI.label: Sun Damage Delay (sec)
GameConfig/SunHeatDamage/SunDamageDelayI.description: Time delay before repeated sun heat damage is applied.

GameConfig/SunHeatDamage/SunDamageMin.label: Minimum Sun Damage
GameConfig/SunHeatDamage/SunDamageMin.description: Lower bound for randomized sun heat damage.

GameConfig/SunHeatDamage/SunDamageMax.label: Maximum Sun Damage
GameConfig/SunHeatDamage/SunDamageMax.description: Upper bound for randomized sun heat damage.

GameConfig/MaxDimensionShip/X.label: Max Ship X
GameConfig/MaxDimensionShip/X.description: Maximum ship dimension on the X axis.

validation.message: Ship dimensions must be whole numbers.

GameConfig/MaxDimensionShip/Y.label: Max Ship Y
GameConfig/MaxDimensionShip/Y.description: Maximum ship dimension on the Y axis.

validation.message: Ship dimensions must be whole numbers.

GameConfig/MaxDimensionShip/Z.label: Max Ship Z
GameConfig/MaxDimensionShip/Z.description: Maximum ship dimension on the Z axis.

validation.message: Ship dimensions must be whole numbers.

GameConfig/MaxDimensionStation/X.label: Max Station X
GameConfig/MaxDimensionStation/X.description: Maximum station dimension on the X axis.

validation.message: Station dimensions must be whole numbers.

GameConfig/MaxDimensionStation/Y.label: Max Station Y
GameConfig/MaxDimensionStation/Y.description: Maximum station dimension on the Y axis.

validation.message: Station dimensions must be whole numbers.

GameConfig/MaxDimensionStation/Z.label: Max Station Z
GameConfig/MaxDimensionStation/Z.description: Maximum station dimension on the Z axis.

validation.message: Station dimensions must be whole numbers.

GameConfig/GroupLimits/Controller[]/ID.label: Controller ID
GameConfig/GroupLimits/Controller[]/ID.description: Controller block ID used for group/computer limits.

validation.message: Controller IDs must be whole numbers.

GameConfig/GroupLimits/Controller[]/Grou.label: Group Max
GameConfig/GroupLimits/Controller[]/Grou.description: Maximum simultaneous groups for this controller.

validation.message: Group max must be a whole number.

GameConfig/GroupLimits/Controller[]/Comp.label: Computer Max
GameConfig/GroupLimits/Controller[]/Comp.description: Maximum number of computers allowed for this controller.

validation.message: Computer max must be a whole number.
